title: Floating point exception is reported in case when use qwp command with -v option.
body:
Automated test case:
https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys-tests/tree/master/misc/qwp

## Steps to reproduce the issue

test case:
```
module top
(
 input x,
 input y,
 input cin,

 output reg A,
 output cout
 );
 wire o;

`ifndef BUG
assign cout =  cin? y : x;
`else
assign {cout,A} =  cin - y * x;
`endif

endmodule

module middle
(
	input x,
	input y,
	output o
);

assign o = x + y;
endmodule
```

script:
read_verilog ../top.v
proc
qwp -v


## Expected behavior

Command executed successfully.

## Actual behavior

yosys> qwp -v

3. Executing QWP pass (quadratic wirelength placer).

Running qwp on module middle..
  x-qwp on X=0.00:1.00, Y=0.00:1.00 with 1 cells, 1 nodes, and 0 edges.
> System size: 1^2
> Edge constraints: 0
> Node constraints: 1
> Solving
Floating point exception (core dumped)
